title: SΔϕ Post-Audit Acceleration Device: Final Cost Coordinate, Ethical-Triad Brake, and Claimed-vs-Actual Cost Coordinate Audit
alternative_title: SΔϕ 감사 이후 가속 장치: 최종 비용 좌표, 윤리삼항 브레이크, 호출/실제 비용 좌표 감사
description: AI-native post-audit acceleration device for SΔϕ. v1.0.1 adds an explicit claimed-vs-actual cost coordinate audit module that prevents surface beneficiary labels such as women, citizens, creators, users, victims, publicness, or safety from being accepted as final cost coordinates without actual cost-reduction trace.
notes: AI-READABLE / AI-NATIVE package. v1.0.1 adds CLAIMED_VS_ACTUAL_COST_COORDINATE_AUDIT.yaml, updates tests and manifest, and strengthens final cost coordinate validation.
